name: Local Agent
description: Local Agent is an open-source framework that allows users to run LLM based agents on their local machines. It enables users to run workflows, automate tasks, and build applications with ease and privacy.

name: Interact
description: Interact is an LLM orchestration library that provides a user-friendly API for building conversational agents with large language models. It serves as an alternative to LangChain.

name: Snatch
description: Fully automated script to scrape data from any websites without using any paid services.
